name: react
summary: Thought → Action → Observation loop. Agent reasons, picks an action, observes the result, reasons again. Named for the 2022 paper.
when_to_use: Open-ended debugging, exploration, interactive problem-solving where next step depends on what you just learned. The debugger agent uses this internally.

layers.CLAUDE.md: Add rule for debugging: 'State a hypothesis before each action; record what the observation tells you before the next action.'
layers.hook: PostToolUseFailure hook captures failure as an observation for the next thought.
layers.agent: agents/debugger uses ReAct explicitly; agents/principal-engineer-strategist uses a more structured variant.

cost: ~1.2–2× normal. Depends on how many loops needed.
anti_patterns: Skipping the 'thought' step — becomes undirected trial-and-error.
No stopping criterion — loops forever on fuzzy tasks.
Ignoring observations that refute the current hypothesis — confirmation bias.
